name: Ben & Jerry's Heath Bar Crunch Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups Heavy Cream or Whipping Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a sharp knife, cut the candy bars into 1/2 to 1 inch chunks. You should have about 1 cup. Place the chunks in a bowl, cover tightly, and freeze until firm.
2. In a mixing bowl, whisk the eggs until light and fluffy, about 1-2 minutes.
3. Gradually whisk in the sugar, then continue whisking until completely blended, about 1 minute more.
4. Pour in the heavy cream or whipping cream, whole milk, and vanilla extract, and whisk to blend thoroughly.
5. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream maker and freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions.
6. After the ice cream has stiffened (about 2 minutes before it is done), add the candy chunks.
7. Continue freezing until the ice cream reaches a desired consistency. Makes generous 1 quart.
Variation: COFFEE HEATH BAR CRUNCH
Omit vanilla extract and substitute 3 tablespoons of good quality freeze-dried coffee.
Add 2 tablespoons of coffee to the cream and milk, and add the remaining 1 tablespoon of coffee with the candy (after the ice cream has stiffened).
